name: Sun Jing (Youtai)

ranks: General of the Gentleman of the Household Who Manifests Righteousness
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	He is not Sun Quan’s brother, as mistakenly described in chapter 39 of Romance of the Three Kingdoms, but rather Sun Jian’s brother. [SGZ]

full_text:
Sun Jing (Youtai) 孫靜 (幼台)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Jing (孫靜), styledYoutai (幼台), was born in Wu. Raised up the troops that would be Jian’s personal guard. Helped defeat Wang Lang. Sun Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
